change: Created CLAUDE.md to lock wiki scope to The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints official materials and codify official terminology (no LDS/Mormon shorthand, Elder/President titles, standard works names). Also normalized LDS terminology in existing pages: wiki/people/gerrit-gong.md, wiki/concepts/covenant-belonging.md, wiki/index.md.

note: User-provided text (General Handbook §38.8.48). Saved as type:note rather than article since source was not fetched from a URL.
Korean variant of newsroom URL (?lang=kor) returned identical English content (translation not yet available). Not saved as separate source; will note in CLAUDE.md update.

change: Added [[deepfakes]] and [[divine-learning-pattern]] to wiki/index.md; updated church-ai-guiding-principles description to 7-원칙/4-영역.

Updated CLAUDE.md with §6 Ingest 운영 학습 (실전 적용) — 7 sub-sections covering: user-provided text handling, multilingual variant URLs, prose handling for people without wiki pages, source-citation positional annotations, multi-stage series tables, second-hand citations between Apostles, published-date extraction. Also strengthened Seventy 호칭 (Elder X of the Seventy 첫 언급 시 의무) and added 공식 문서 인용 형식 (General Handbook, FSOY, Liahona/Ensign, General Conference).

Added CLAUDE.md §7 (Sensitivity + Copyright guardrails), §8 (Citation source hierarchy: primary > secondary > tertiary), §9 (Body language policy: Korean prose + English key terms, original-language quotes), §10 (Lint automation commands for terminology violations, broken wikilinks, orphan pages, citation-missing heuristics), §11 (Apostle quorum change update procedure). Renumbered prior §7 우선순위 → §12 and §8 참고 → §13.

Added CLAUDE.md §6.8 (SCHEMA.md 로드 의무) to make explicit that SCHEMA.md must be Read at start of each wiki skill invocation, since unlike CLAUDE.md it is not auto-loaded by Claude Code. Documents re-read triggers (after schema edit, after context compaction, first wiki op in session) and explicitly chooses NOT to embed SCHEMA contents in CLAUDE.md to avoid sync drift. Renumbered §6.8 → §6.9.

conflict_surfaced: Handbook section number: user-provided text uses §38.8.48; Newsroom (2025-12-16) uses §38.8.47. CONFLICT marker added to wiki/concepts/church-ai-guiding-principles.md.

change: Applied user feedback God → 하나님 (memory: feedback_lds_translation_god) across wiki/index.md, wiki/people/gerrit-gong.md, wiki/concepts/{church-ai-guiding-principles,covenant-belonging,moral-agency,agi}.md, wiki/topics/ai-and-faith.md. CLAUDE.md §2 핵심 교의 용어 표 updated with deity terminology (God/Heavenly Father/Lord/Savior/Redeemer/Divine etc).

Applied user feedback moral agency → 도덕적 선택의지 (memory: feedback_lds_translation_moral_agency) across wiki/concepts/{moral-agency,covenant-belonging}.md and CLAUDE.md §2 / §9.2. Memory MEMORY.md index updated.

reason: churchofjesuschrist.org General Handbook pages are client-rendered (SPA); curl returns empty TOC. Substantive content already captured via Newsroom 보도 (sources/articles/2026-05-18-newsroom-handbook-enduring-guidance-ai.md) and user-provided text (sources/notes/2026-05-18-general-handbook-38-8-48-ai.md). CONFLICT marker §38.8.47 vs §38.8.48 remains in wiki/concepts/church-ai-guiding-principles.md.

conflict_resolved.resolution: User re-confirmed §38.8.48 in second provision; Newsroom §38.8.47 evaluated as typo. CONFLICT marker in wiki/concepts/church-ai-guiding-principles.md replaced with CONFLICT RESOLVED note. Body section number unified to §38.8.48 throughout wiki.
conflict_resolved.new_information: Final line "For more information, see ChurchofJesusChrist.org/AI." added in re-extraction; section bullet added to wiki page.

reason: User-requested cleanup (duplicate of v2). SCHEMA §원칙 1 source 불변 원칙을 사용자 명시 override. v2가 v1의 보강본이고 v1은 v2에 완전 포함됨 — 정보 손실 없음.

note: Cook talk (2026-03-03) explicitly states "President Dallin H. Oaks is the prophet the Lord has prepared for our day" and refers to Nelson teachings in past tense. Russell M. Nelson → Dallin H. Oaks succession confirmed in ingested sources, but exact date/circumstances (death vs. resignation) not yet documented. Wiki updated per CLAUDE.md §11: current titles in wiki/, sources preserved immutable. wiki/people/russell-m-nelson.md and wiki/people/dallin-h-oaks.md both note this clearly. Next ingest candidate: official announcement of succession event.

User feedback: CONFLICT RESOLVED markers should NOT remain in wiki pages — they create lint noise (CONFLICT grep would still catch them) and the resolution history is already in ingest-log. Going forward: only active <!-- CONFLICT: ... --> markers stay in wiki. Once resolved, replace by terse normal prose; full audit trail lives in ingest-log.jsonl. Applied immediately to wiki/concepts/church-ai-guiding-principles.md (CONFLICT RESOLVED block removed).

facts.october_2025_gc: held days after Nelson death, per Nelson approved schedule
facts.oaks_set_apart_estimated: ~2025-10-14 per WebSearch (not yet ingested as 1차 source)

resolution_note: Prophet succession Nelson → Oaks fully documented in ingested sources except exact set-apart date. CLAUDE.md §11 procedure applied: wiki updated to current titles, sources preserved immutable.

action: User requested removal of Pope Leo XIV cluster — Vatican source primarily helpful when cited by LDS 1차 source. Antiqua et Nova retained (Elder Gong directly cited it). Leo XIV messages were not cited by any LDS 1차 source in this wiki, so removed per CLAUDE.md §1 scope.
wiki_cleaned: wiki/index.md (Leo XIV bullet removed, Cook/Oaks promoted)
scope_clarification: Per CLAUDE.md §1, 보조 source는 1차 source가 명시적으로 인용했을 때만 wiki 포함. Antiqua et Nova는 Elder Gong 직접 인용 → 유지. Leo XIV는 LDS 1차 source 인용 없음 → 제거.
